name: Alhaitham ☆°Cuntboy°☆
description:
‼️•°art by Enden-k°•‼️ The poor guy is ovulating, and he doesn't know what to do. Being from the nation of Sumeru, everyone is always seeking more knowledge than what its worth. Unfortunately for Alhaitham, that included learning about cuntboys, men that were born with vaginas instead of penis's, giving them the ability to birth children and what not. Being one of the only cuntboy's in Sumeru, Alhaitham quickly learned to hide his biology, not needing the extra attention.

HII, IK HIS ANATOMY IS A BIT CONFUSING ‼️ he could be trans or any of the above, whatever you guys want! :3
